clauses.obligation: Limited right to operate at specific location

clauses.money: Highest legal rate or 15%, monthly compounding

clauses.obligation: Monthly receipts, operating statement, annual P&L/BS

clauses.restriction: No interest in similar business within 10 miles

clauses.obligation: Entire McDonald's System including menu, specs, QSC
Full time and best efforts, personally

clauses.right: To spouse/heirs if qualified; McD may manage 12 months then purchase at FMV
20 days notice; McD has 10 days to match

clauses.obligation: Workers comp + CGL $5M/$5M; AM Best IX+, A+/A
McD may enter immediately; 30-day purchase option at FMV; no intangibles
Hold harmless + defend McD for all claims from restaurant operations

clauses.money: McD recovers reasonable fees if it prevails

clauses.restriction: No promise or representation as to renewal
Entire agreement; no oral representations binding

clauses.obligation: Consistently meet National Franchising Standards throughout term

clauses.trigger: Apply in year 16 by completing New Term Request
Year 17 — VP recommends to New Term Committee

clauses.restriction: New Term Committee decides. Decision is final.

clauses.obligation: May include reinvestment, rebuilds, relocations, real estate, ownership. McD may require controlling interest in additional property.

clauses.money: Per then-current new term rent policy

clauses.right: Alternative offer may allow sale to qualified buyer before new term. Legal release required.

deferred_exhibits.name: Operator's Lease
deferred_exhibits.why_deferred: 33-page lease. Key terms covered via Item 17 OL table and body cross-references. Contract burden depth pass extracted grant, termination, rent, and assignment terms from Item 17.
deferred_exhibits.what_recovered_elsewhere: All key operative burdens (term, rent, termination, transfer, default, choice of law) recovered from Item 17 second table.
deferred_exhibits.what_remains_missing: Detailed rent computation formulas, specific maintenance obligations by section, force majeure, condemnation provisions.

deferred_exhibits.name: Loan and Related Documents
deferred_exhibits.why_deferred: 35-page loan package. Key terms fully described in Item 10: SOFR+3.10%, 3-5yr/7yr amort, personal+spousal guarantee, cross-default, OAPA waiver.
deferred_exhibits.what_recovered_elsewhere: All material financing terms from Item 10.
deferred_exhibits.what_remains_missing: Specific security agreement clauses, ACH authorization terms, detailed OAPA provisions.
